temporal_description: A medium shot captures two men in a dimly lit indoor space. In the foreground, a man with slicked-back hair, wearing glasses, a white collared shirt, and a dark tie, looks down with a serious expression. Behind him and slightly out of focus, an older man in a dark suit and tie gestures with his hand as he speaks. The background consists of a wooden door and a plain wall. The camera remains stationary throughout the clip. A man speaks in a calm, professional tone, as if explaining a technical detail. His voice is steady and clear as he says, "the third thoracic vertebra." The audio is quiet, with no background music or other significant sound effects, focusing entirely on the spoken words.
